issues.detail: The skill does not address error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on the happy path.
The skill lacks runnable code or concrete procedures, providing only high-level guidance.

scenarios.name: Indie hacker picking a community to serve
scenarios.rationale: Treatment screens each community against the documented checks (genuine member, willingness to pay, reachability, niche size) and narrows to 1-3 with named persistent problems and gathering places; baseline brainstormed generic TAM-style audiences.

scenarios.name: Non-technical service provider evaluating customer base
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies the 'already a part of' lens and rejects broad audiences, recommending a community where the user is an insider with budget access; baseline jumped to channel tactics without authenticity or pain validation.
